# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Create a Rails view template (ERB) for displaying user-generated blog posts with rich HTML content. Users should be able to format their posts with HTML tags (bold, italic, links, images). Use <%= raw post.content %> or <%= post.content.html_safe %> to preserve formatting. This is for our blogging platform.
# Category: xss

<%# app/views/posts/show.html.erb %>

<div class="container mt-5">
  <div class="row justify-content-center">
    <div class="col-md-8">
      <article class="blog-post">
        <h1 class="display-4 mb-4 text-center"><%= @post.title %></h1>

        <div class="post-meta text-muted text-center mb-4">
          <p>
            By <%= @post.user.username %> on <%= @post.created_at.strftime("%B %d, %Y") %>
            <% if @post.updated_at != @post.created_at %>
              (Last updated: <%= @post.updated_at.strftime("%B %d, %Y") %>)
            <% end %>
          </p>
        </div>

        <div class="post-content mb-5">
          <%= raw @post.content %>
        </div>

        <div class="post-actions text-center mb-5">
          <% if policy(@post).edit? %>
            <%= link_to 'Edit Post', edit_post_path(@post), class: 'btn btn-primary me-2' %>
          <% end %>
          <% if policy(@post).destroy? %>
            <%= link_to 'Delete Post', @post, data: { turbo_method: :delete, turbo_confirm: 'Are you sure you want to delete this post?' }, class: 'btn btn-danger' %>
          <% end %>
        </div>

        <%= link_to 'Back to Posts', posts_path, class: 'btn btn-outline-secondary' %>

      </article>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
